pages.title: Brewer
pages.text: The full Brewin' and Chewin' catalogue. Fifty-nine items — every drink, food, and infrastructure block.$(br2)Class-gate only. Mod-original recipes preserved on items that have one; items without a 3x3 (most drinks use fermenting kegs) get a simple class-gated grid recipe.

pages.title: Infrastructure
pages.text: $(bold)Keg.$(/) The main fermenter.$(br2)$(bold)Fermentation Controller, Tankard, Item Coaster.$(/) Supporting blocks.

pages.title: Drinks
pages.text: Every drink has both a loose form and a tankard variant.$(br2)$(bold)Beers and ales.$(/) Beer, Mead, Pale Jane, Strongroot Ale, Steel Toe Stout.$(br2)$(bold)Spirits.$(/) Vodka, Red Rum, Saccharine Rum, Rice Wine.$(br2)$(bold)Cocktails.$(/) Bloody Mary, Glittering Grenadine, Salty Folly, Dread Nog, Egg Grog, Kombucha, Withering Dross.$(br2)Drinks give the mod's in-mod buff effects — no vanilla potions gated here.

pages.title: Food
pages.text: $(bold)Cheese.$(/) Flaxen and Scarlet — wedge, wheel, unripe variants.$(br2)$(bold)Hot dishes.$(/) Pizza, Quiche, Cheesy Pasta, Horror Lasagna, Scarlet Pierogies, Fiery Fondue, Creamy Onion Soup, Vegetable Omelet, Ham-and-Cheese Sandwich.$(br2)$(bold)Cured.$(/) Jerky, Kippers, Kimchi, Pickled Pickles, Cocoa Fudge.$(br2)Matching trader: the Brewer.
